- 10:00 — already booked (Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00).

Before I create the event, two quick clarifying questions:
1. Which time would you like me to use instead (09:00–10:00 or 11:30–12:30), or should I pick the earliest available (09:00–10:00)? If you prefer a different time that afternoon, tell me the range.
2. Who should be invited? (Provide email addresses, or tell me to invite the same attendees as the Project Kick-off.)
Optional: confirm title and description — I can use:
- Title: "Follow-up Meeting"
- Description (short): "Follow-up to review action items and next steps from the kick-off."

If you confirm time and attendees (or say “invite no one”), I will schedule the 1-hour meeting and include the description.
